description: Protected files and patterns for safe upstream merge

ui/src/ui/navigation.ts.intent: Added jarvis, mode, usage tabs; restructured tab groups into chat/control/agent/integrations/settings; migrated titles/subtitles to i18n t() calls

ui/src/ui/app-render.ts.intent: Added renders for jarvis, mode, memory, usage, session-history tabs; restructured imports to .ts extensions; added compaction status, background job toasts, chat stream timing, update button in topbar

ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts.intent: Added BackgroundJobToast type, compactionStatus, chatStreamStartedAt, chatManualRefreshInFlight, backgroundJobToasts array, session history state, usage state types

ui/src/ui/app.ts.intent: Extended main app class with new state properties for jarvis, mode, memory, usage, session history, compaction, background toasts; added corresponding event handlers and lifecycle hooks

ui/src/ui/app-settings.ts.intent: Added new controller imports for agent-files, agent-identity, agent-skills, mode, archived sessions, discord status; added tab loading for mode, jarvis, usage

ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts.intent: Extended chat handling with session history integration and manual refresh support

ui/src/ui/app-render.helpers.ts.intent: Extended render helpers with compaction button, context gauge, update button, session history dropdown integration

ui/src/ui/plugins/registry.ts.intent: Dynamic UI plugin registration system — entirely custom, not in upstream

src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.ts.intent: Added session history RPC endpoints for archive, list-archived, restore, delete-archived, rename

src/gateway/server-methods/update.ts.intent: Added update.checkUpstream RPC with git-based upstream divergence detection and 5-min cache

src/gateway/server-methods/pipedream.ts.intent: Added ensureMcporterServer helper, pipedream.activate RPC, agent-specific externalUserId, mcporter PATH/CWD fixes

src/gateway/method-scopes.ts.intent: Added pipedream.* and update.* methods to READ_SCOPE and WRITE_SCOPE groups

src/cli/gateway-cli/run-loop.ts.intent: Added SIGTERM graceful drain with DRAIN_TIMEOUT_MS, isGracefulStop flag

src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts.intent: Added OAuth priority enforcement via sortedProfileOrder sort, authProfileId tracking

src/gateway/control-ui-csp.ts.intent: Extended connect-src with localhost (Jarvis voice) and api.openai.com (Realtime API)

src/gateway/server-methods/bg-sessions.t.intent: New RPC handlers: bgSessions.list (lists isolated/cron sessions), bgSessions.history (reads .jsonl transcript). Added 2026-03-01.

ui/src/ui/controllers/bg-sessions.ts.intent: Controller for background sessions panel — loadBgSessions, loadBgSessionHistory, sendBgMessage, selectBgSession, open/close panel, 3s polling. Added 2026-03-01.

ui/src/ui/views/bg-sessions.ts.intent: Right-side drawer panel: session dropdown, live transcript, send input, auto-refresh. Rendered as overlay in app-render.ts. Added 2026-03-01.

src/gateway/server-methods.ts.intent: Registers all gateway RPC handlers. Custom handlers added: pipedreamHandlers, pipedreamAgentHandlers, zapierHandlers, zapierAgentHandlers, hostingerHandlers, bgSessionsHandlers, discordConnectHandlers.

src/gateway/server-methods/hostinger.ts.intent: Hostinger VPS management RPC handlers — installed from skills/hostinger-vps-deploy reference. Not in upstream.

src/gateway/server-methods/plugins-ui.ts.intent: Plugin UI registry with builtin views: jarvis, apikeys (Vault), compaction, discord. getDynamicTabGroups merges static TAB_GROUPS with plugin-registered views.

ui/src/ui/views/memory.ts.intent: Memory tab view with first-load spinner — shows spinner until health+stats data arrives instead of rendering empty content.

newFiles.description: Files we created that don't exist in upstream — auto-keep on merge

protectedPatterns.description: String patterns that must exist somewhere in the codebase after merge

autoAcceptPaths.description: Paths where upstream changes are always safe to accept (no custom code)

refactorChecklist.description: Extra checks required when upstream moves functions out of a file into sub-modules (module-extraction refactors). These are the highest-risk merge patterns.
triggers: New import lines are added to a file that also has local functions with the same names

checks.description: Check for zombie local functions that share a name with newly-imported symbols
checks.howTo: After merge: grep for 'function <name>' in the file for every name listed in the new import statements. If a local copy exists AND the import was added, the local copy must be deleted.
checks.wouldHaveCaught: 2026-03-02 runtime.ts crash — collectConfigAssignments et al. were imported but also still defined locally

checks.description: Verify all symbols called within local functions are actually imported
checks.howTo: Run: grep -n 'coerceSecretRef\|isNonEmptyString\|isRecord\|SecretDefaults\|ProviderLike' <file> and confirm each is in an import statement. Any hit in a function body with no matching import = runtime crash.
checks.wouldHaveCaught: 2026-03-02 runtime.ts crash — coerceSecretRef referenced but never imported

checks.description: When upstream adds SecretInputSchema support to new fields, check our schema for z.string() fields that should accept SecretRef objects
checks.howTo: Search for z.string() on apiKey, token, secret fields: grep -n 'apiKey.*z\.string\|token.*z\.string\|secret.*z\.string' src/config/
checks.wouldHaveCaught: 2026-03-02 memorySearch.remote.apiKey, talk.apiKey, tts.elevenlabs.apiKey rejecting vault refs
